title: Transportation Planners
description: Prepare studies for proposed transportation projects. Gather, compile, and analyze data. Study the use and operation of transportation systems. Develop transportation models or simulations.

tasks.text: Define regional or local transportation planning problems or priorities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Participate in public meetings or hearings to explain planning proposals, to gather feedback from those affected by projects, or to achieve consensus on project designs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare reports or recommendations on transportation planning.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collaborate with engineers to research, analyze, or resolve complex transportation design issues.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Recommend transportation system improvements or projects, based on economic, population, land-use, or traffic projections.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop computer models to address transportation planning issues.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Analyze information related to transportation, such as land use policies, environmental impact of projects, or long-range planning needs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Interpret data from traffic modeling software, geographic information systems, or associated databases.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Design transportation surveys to identify areas of public concern.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collaborate with other professionals to develop sustainable transportation strategies at the local, regional, or national level.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate transportation project needs or costs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Analyze information from traffic counting programs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Review development plans for transportation system effects, infrastructure requirements, or compliance with applicable transportation regulations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare necessary documents to obtain planned project approvals or permits.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Produce environmental documents, such as environmental assessments or environmental impact statements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Prepare or review engineering studies or specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Develop or test new methods or models of transportation analysis.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate transportation-related consequences of federal or state legislative proposals.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Design new or improved transport infrastructure, such as junction improvements, pedestrian projects, bus facilities, or car parking areas.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Define or update information such as urban boundaries or classification of roadways.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct urban traffic counting programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Represent jurisdictions in the legislative or administrative approval of land development projects.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
